name: camera-tunnel-zoom-preservation
description: Verify Invisicam keeps the player-selected zoom distance while entering enclosed depth tunnels.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local cam=workspace.CurrentCamera return H:JSONEncode({mode=p.DevCameraOcclusionMode.Name,cameraType=cam.CameraType.Name,combat=g:GetAttribute("CombatCameraActive"),preserve=g:GetAttribute("PreservePlayerZoomInTunnels"),serverFlag=p:GetAttribute("PreserveTunnelCameraZoom"),attribute=g:GetAttribute("CameraOcclusionMode")})

local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local root=p.Character and p.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") local cam=workspace.CurrentCamera assert(root,"missing root") local oldMin,oldMax=p.CameraMinZoomDistance,p.CameraMaxZoomDistance p.CameraMinZoomDistance=14 p.CameraMaxZoomDistance=14 task.wait(1) local before=(cam.CFrame.Position-cam.Focus.Position).Magnitude local shell=Instance.new("Part") shell.Name="Camera Occlusion Test Shell" shell.Size=Vector3.new(8,8,8) shell.CFrame=root.CFrame shell.Anchored=true shell.CanCollide=false shell.CanTouch=false shell.CanQuery=true shell.Transparency=0 shell.Parent=workspace task.wait(1) local after=(cam.CFrame.Position-cam.Focus.Position).Magnitude local localTransparency=shell.LocalTransparencyModifier shell:Destroy() p.CameraMinZoomDistance=oldMin p.CameraMaxZoomDistance=oldMax return H:JSONEncode({before=before,after=after,zoomPreserved=math.abs(after-before)<=0.5,localTransparency=localTransparency,mode=p.DevCameraOcclusionMode.Name})

steps.label: enclosure stays transparent without changing user zoom
